title: Tin Pail Silver Reindeer Plant Pot 20cm, 8inch Rustic Antler Smiling Face Christmas Festive Gift Deer Planter Xmas (2)
features: Tin Pail Silver Reinder Planter with Antler.
Decorative Christmas planter featuring a smiling reindeer face with 3D antlers and rustic style.
Make your Home and Garden Beautiful with this Planter on this Christmas.
Ready to hold different Plants and make them Shine.

description: Christmas Reindeer Metal Planter Pot. With its smiling face, raised antlers, and rustic silver finish, this charming planter makes a delightful addition to your seasonal décor. Crafted from durable tin metal, it’s perfect for displaying small plants, herbs, succulents, or poinsettias.This planter is reusable year after year, making it a fun and practical way to style your holiday home.
